title: Senior Financial Analyst - Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates - Immediate Joiners Preferred
company: Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Kanpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates:
Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates!
